title: BEM-848 execute protocol route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/roadmap']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:24 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem847_route_after_protocol_decision.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
decision=route.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
if rs=='protocol_approved_resume_roadmap':
    marker=Path('governance/roadmap/BEM848_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_RESUME_ROADMAP.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-848 | Protocol Approved — Resume Roadmap'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Protocol: '+str(route.get('protocol'))+sep+'Next roadmap: resume implementation under BEM-846 agreed protocol.'+sep)
    status='roadmap_resume_marker_created'
    next_action='continue current roadmap implementation under approved protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif rs=='protocol_change_required':
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_protocol_change_required_repair.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-848 | Protocol Change Required Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract Claude requested changes from BEM-845 draft and patch protocol.'+sep)
    status='protocol_change_repair_opened'
    next_action='extract requested changes and patch protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif rs=='protocol_blocked':
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_protocol_blocker_repair.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-848 | Protocol Blocker Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract blocker from BEM-845 draft and repair.'+sep)
    status='protocol_blocker_repair_opened'
    next_action='extract blocker and repair'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
else:
    status='protocol_route_unknown'
    next_action='inspect BEM-847/BEM-846 decision extraction'
    created_files=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':status,'route_status':rs,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_execute_protocol_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_execute_protocol_route.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Execute Protocol Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem848_execute_protocol_route.json','governance/reports/bem848_execute_protocol_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-847 protocol route by creating a roadmap resume marker or a protocol repair task')
"""
No issue comments.
